brief_notes: Full paper-orchestrator pipeline with all 5 stages executed end-to-end. 20 PubMed-verified citations (no hallucinations). 5 figures generated: 1 schematic pipeline + 3 data-grounded quantitative plots + 1 dataset summary. 2 tables: dataset summary and permutation-stability summary. All numbers (U-AUC ranges 1.00/0.64 and 0.88/0.54, KP-ablation 0.696/0.733, Cliff's delta large boundary 0.474, permutation counts 30/100/500) traced verbatim to experimental_log.md extraction. Unified voice across sections, Discussion contains 6 substantive paragraphs, results subsections follow Context-Approach-Finding-Interpretation structure. Two refinement rounds both accepted with monotone overall improvement (82 -> 84 -> 85).
